reviews.review_title: dont waste your money on this garbage
reviews.review_description: whoever made this game is either bad at making games or they like scamming people smh😔

It doesn’t work right I can’t pick up the revolver. I can’t do anything. It just makes me sit there walk around all I’m doing is just sitting a black area the table and a guy throwing a revolver at me. It’s super glitched. This doesn’t work. This is not what I paid for. I paid 6 
dollars for this. ￼

developer_response.body:
1. Response:
We will fix and update the issue with weapon usage as soon as possible. We apologize for the inconvenience and will make it right as soon as we can.

2. Response:
Hello,

After our review, we did not find any issues related to shooting or picking up weapons. It seems that the problem might be related to your device. However, we have made some updates in a few areas to prevent potential issues and will be releasing a new update soon. We hope you won’t encounter the same or a similar issue again.

reviews.review_description: When I play it always glitches

What can I say? I got it on sale. And for two dollars it’s not half bad. It is rough, however, and it uses that generic AI voice that has been used in many other things. And I don’t have a problem with that. I’m just making note of it. Just a little more time and a few more patches and it should be up and running quite nicely. I would encourage people to try it out so multiplayer functions properly. ￼

developer_response.body: Thank you for your comment. Due to an issue I can't work on the update right now. I am aware of the problem. You can be sure that I will solve this problem with an update as soon as possible.

reviews.review_title: didn’t live up to what i thought
reviews.review_description: it’s very broken, and just bad. bullet roulette is a lot better for someone how actually wants to play it normally

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We’re sorry to hear that your experience didn’t meet your expectations. We’ll take your comments into account as we work to improve our game. We're glad you enjoyed Bullet Roulette, but we hope to provide you with a better experience in the future with our updates! If you could specify which parts felt broken, we’ll focus on those areas to address the issues as best as we can.
